ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., FW, MF) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the player belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Market value of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (left/right) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle (for fan engagement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was established */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the club competes */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring from */,
  "to_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is being recorded */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player under contract */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the contract is with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus amount for the player */,
  "renewal_option" INTEGER /* Whether the contract has a renewal option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the scout is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the scout */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Scout's specialization (e.g., attacking, defending, goalkeeping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Scout, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated recovery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "home_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home club */,
  "away_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away club */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1, 0-0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card, red card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistic is being recorded */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., passing accuracy, shot conversion rate) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
